meaning: adj.推斥的,排斥的,严拒的,令人厌恶的
examples: A statue which is aesthetically pleasing to one person, however, may be repulsive to another.
This is based on the theory that close-range, nonbonded interactions are repulsive, i.e. Steric strain.
So that is a repulsive term.
Sewage rises in rank pools from broken pipes, rubbish is piling up in repulsive, fetid heaps.
Kuhn's aggressive melancholy and fanaticism are compelling to watch, although physically, she's been made to appear repulsive.
